title: Stage 3 Finalization
baseline: Stage 3 planned queue has completed plan-016 through plan-024: verify run, plan update, module splits, environment metadata, trust/stale, failure classification, atomic writes, and memory/drift/routing module split.
goals: Audit the completed Stage 3 capability set and decide whether v0.3 Verify Runner can be marked complete.
Synchronize README, development-roadmap, task-board, and 阶段规划 so Stage 3 is marked complete and Stage 4 Attractor Registry is the next implementation stage.
Record closure evidence that Stage 3 completed without introducing new Stage 4 functionality.
Keep this slice documentation/governance-only with no behavior, schema, CLI, MCP, storage, or algorithm changes.
non_goals: Do not implement Attractor Registry, audit independence tooling, drift quality upgrades, reports, init, CI templates, or new CLI/MCP commands in this slice.
Do not change plan/audit/verification state machines, close gates, stale semantics, storage format, or schemas.
Do not rewrite historical verification or audit facts from prior plans.
exit_criteria: development-roadmap marks Stage 3 complete, identifies v0.3 readiness, and lists Stage 4 Attractor Registry as the next stage.
README and 阶段规划 consistently describe Stage 3 as complete and Stage 4 as next.
task-board contains Sprint 21 plan-025 closure tasks.
No behavior code changes are made outside documentation and ABH plan/audit/verification records for this slice.
closure_evidence: docs/阶段规划.md Stage 3 completion update
Independent audit confirms docs-only finalization scope
